'''Pylokam''' was an aged [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who sold health food in the [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] marketplace in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. He sold food without [[Sugar/Legends|sugars]], [[Salt/Legends|salts]], or artificial additives. [[Predne Balu]] held a watch at his stand while looking for [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]].<ref name="Nightlily" />

==Behind the scenes==
In the audio dramatization of "[[Nightlily: The Lovers' Tale]]," the character was voiced by [[Bill Raymond]].
